title: callitriche muelleri
intro: Callitriche muelleri, also known as Mueller's waterstar or Australian water-starwort, is a small, aquatic perennial plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Callitriche muelleri is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
